⚙ AutoFlow Setup
Setup once: Install the AutoFlow HC v3 userscript (Import tab → Userscripts), then open the AutoFlow plan-summary tab once per shift. The userscript captures the plan ID automatically — MAD7 then polls the Direct API every 3 min with no tab needed. Or paste the URL manually below as fallback.

⚠ Needs Justification — High NPT (>25%)
📋 Workflow
1. Make sure both userscripts are installed: Idle Time Tool v3.5 + MAD7 NPT v2.0
2. Open FCLM Function Rollup for each Process Path you want to monitor
3. Workers with idle > 10% auto-appear here, grouped by PP
4. Click any row → add justification note → export for SOM report
Colour legend
10–15% — Low
15–25% — Watch
>25% — Action needed
Justified ✓
🕵️ Idle Hunter · big jumps in Activity Details
Pull Activity Details from FCLM, surface every >5 min jump per AA, identify lost time and follow-up cases — Pack & Pick only
Open FCLM Activity Details
AAs scanned
—
Pack & Pick
Idle jumps
—
> threshold

—
summed jumps
Worst jump
—
single biggest
Slow starters
—
> 10m from shift start
Break overrun
—
exceeded allowance
Early stoppers
—
> 10m before shift end
🕵️ How it works
1. Install the MAD7 Idle Hunter v1.0 userscript (Imports tab → Userscripts)
2. Pick the shift + date above and your jump threshold (default 5 min)
3. Click 🚀 Bulk scan → select Pick, Pack, or Singles → FCLM opens for that process
4. The userscript auto-scrapes each AA's Activity Details and sends results back here
5. Repeat for each process · results merge · fast-start, break overrun & strong-finish are auto-detected
Severity colours
No jumps — clean
< 10 min lost
10–25 min lost
> 25 min lost
🚨
Likely systemic — multiple AAs idle at the same time
Check root cause first (jam, conveyor, induct, system) — saves 1-on-1 conversations

    📊 RISK PER PROCESS PATH
    UPH = Rate × HC (or walls) · Risk = Units ÷ (UPH × h to CPT) · >1 = at risk

📦 Packman — manual paste fallback

    

      No Tampermonkey? Copy all text from the Packman page and paste below.
    

    
    

      
      
    

    

  


  
  
  


    
  

    
📥 Tampermonkey / Violentmonkey — Required Scripts

    
Install all 5 below. The Bridge enables auto-fetch; Rate and Idle Auto capture live data from FCLM.


    
    

    


      

      

      

      

      

      

    



    
    

      
⚡ Quick start — how to install & use

      

        Step 1 — Install Tampermonkey

        Add the Tampermonkey browser extension (Chrome / Edge). One-time setup.

        Step 2 — Install the scripts

        Click each card above → a code window opens → copy the code → paste into Tampermonkey → Ctrl+S to save. Install in this order:

          🔌 Unified Bridge v1.0 — INSTALL THIS FIRST, enables all live data features

          📦 Packman v4.0 — auto-sends floor-map data when you open Packman

          🏭 Workforce v3.0 — auto-sends HC actuals from the Workforce page

          📊 PPR Rate v22 — captures live JPH rates from FCLM pages

          ⏱ Idle NPT Auto v1 — fills NPT % automatically from the idle tracker

        Step 3 — Import data

        Open this tool, then click ⚡ Import everything (button above). The tool opens each source page automatically and pulls the data — no copy-paste needed.
